name: enablePlugin
description: Property that controls whether the Meteor Showers plugin is enabled. Reading via core.getStelProperty() returns 'true' or 'false'.
returnDescription: true if the plugin is enabled, false otherwise

name: getEnableLabels
description: Returns whether radiant labels (names of meteor showers) are displayed next to the radiant markers.
returnDescription: true if labels are visible, false if hidden

name: setEnableLabels
description: Shows or hides radiant labels (names of meteor showers) next to the radiant markers.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

example: MeteorShowers.setEnableLabels(true);

name: enableLabels
description: Property that controls whether radiant labels are displayed. Reading via core.getStelProperty() returns 'true' or 'false'.
returnDescription: true if labels are visible, false otherwise

name: getEnableMarker
description: Returns whether radiant markers (visual indicators) are displayed for meteor showers.
returnDescription: true if markers are visible, false if hidden

name: setEnableMarker
description: Shows or hides radiant markers (visual indicators) for meteor showers.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show markers, false to hide

example: MeteorShowers.setEnableMarker(true);

name: getActiveRadiantOnly
description: Returns whether only currently active meteor showers are displayed (based on their activity dates).
returnDescription: true if only active radiants are shown, false if all radiants shown

name: setActiveRadiantOnly
description: Sets whether only currently active meteor showers should be displayed based on their activity dates.

parameters.name: activeOnly
parameters.description: true to show only active radiants, false to show all

example: MeteorShowers.setActiveRadiantOnly(true);

name: getFontSize
description: Returns the current font size for radiant labels in pixels.
example:
var size = MeteorShowers.getFontSize();
core.debug("Label font size: " + size + "px");

name: setFontSize
description: Sets the font size for radiant labels in pixels.
example: MeteorShowers.setFontSize(15);

name: getColorARG
description: Returns the color for active radiants based on generic (unconfirmed) data. Returns a Vec3f object which prints as [r, g, b] with values from 0.0 to 1.0.

name: setColorARG
description: Sets the color for active radiants based on generic (unconfirmed) data.

parameters.name: rgb
parameters.description: RGB color vector created via core.vec3f(r, g, b)

name: colorARG
description: Property that gets/sets the color for active radiants based on generic data. Reading via core.getStelProperty() returns a comma-separated string. Writing expects a Vec3f created with core.vec3f().
returnDescription: RGB color - as Vec3f when written, as string (r,g,b) when read via core.getStelProperty()

name: getColorARC
description: Returns the color for active radiants based on confirmed data. Returns a Vec3f object which prints as [r, g, b] with values from 0.0 to 1.0.

name: setColorARC
description: Sets the color for active radiants based on confirmed data.

parameters.name: rgb
parameters.description: RGB color vector created via core.vec3f(r, g, b)

name: colorARC
description: Property that gets/sets the color for active radiants based on confirmed data. Reading via core.getStelProperty() returns a comma-separated string. Writing expects a Vec3f created with core.vec3f().
returnDescription: RGB color - as Vec3f when written, as string (r,g,b) when read via core.getStelProperty()

name: getColorIR
description: Returns the color for inactive radiants. Returns a Vec3f object which prints as [r, g, b] with values from 0.0 to 1.0.

name: setColorIR
description: Sets the color for inactive radiants.

parameters.name: rgb
parameters.description: RGB color vector created via core.vec3f(r, g, b)

name: colorIR
description: Property that gets/sets the color for inactive radiants. Reading via core.getStelProperty() returns a comma-separated string. Writing expects a Vec3f created with core.vec3f().
returnDescription: RGB color - as Vec3f when written, as string (r,g,b) when read via core.getStelProperty()

name: getEnableAtStartup
description: Returns whether the Meteor Showers plugin will be automatically enabled when Stellarium starts.
returnDescription: true if enabled at startup, false otherwise

name: setEnableAtStartup
description: Sets whether the Meteor Showers plugin should be automatically enabled when Stellarium starts.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to enable at startup, false to disable

example: MeteorShowers.setEnableAtStartup(true);

name: getShowEnableButton
description: Returns whether the Meteor Showers plugin enable/disable button is visible on the toolbar.
returnDescription: true if button is visible, false if hidden

name: setShowEnableButton
description: Shows or hides the Meteor Showers plugin enable/disable button on the toolbar.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: true to show button, false to hide

example: MeteorShowers.setShowEnableButton(true);

name: getShowSearchButton
description: Returns whether the Meteor Showers search dialog button is visible on the toolbar.
returnDescription: true if button is visible, false if hidden

name: setShowSearchButton
description: Shows or hides the Meteor Showers search dialog button on the toolbar.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: true to show button, false to hide

example: MeteorShowers.setShowSearchButton(true);

name: getUpdateFrequencyHours
description: Returns the frequency of automatic catalog updates in hours. Default is 720 hours (30 days).
example:
var freq = MeteorShowers.getUpdateFrequencyHours();
core.debug("Update frequency: " + freq + " hours");

name: setUpdateFrequencyHours
description: Sets the frequency of automatic catalog updates in hours.
example: MeteorShowers.setUpdateFrequencyHours(168);

name: getEnableAutoUpdates
description: Returns whether automatic catalog updates from the internet are enabled.
returnDescription: true if auto updates are enabled, false if disabled

name: setEnableAutoUpdates
description: Enables or disables automatic catalog updates from the internet.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to enable auto updates, false to disable

example: MeteorShowers.setEnableAutoUpdates(true);

name: updateCatalog
description: Manually triggers an immediate update of the meteor showers catalog from the internet.
example:
MeteorShowers.updateCatalog();
core.debug("Catalog update started...");

name: restoreDefaultSettings
description: Restores all Meteor Showers plugin settings to their default values (colors, font size, update frequency, etc.) and resets the catalog.
example:
MeteorShowers.restoreDefaultSettings();
core.debug("Meteor showers settings restored to defaults");

name: displayMessage
description: Displays a temporary message on the screen for plugin warnings and notifications.

parameters.name: hexColor
parameters.description: Color in hex format (e.g., '#999999' for gray)

example: MeteorShowers.displayMessage("Perseids peak tonight!", "#ffaa00");
